title: Fix #2521
body: * Bad merge against podman stop, restored overwritten code

comments.body: Lint is angry. Appease the CI gods and I will LGTM.

I'm going to slap an approve on here in the interest of getting 1.1.2 out the door today, but more tests to address the issue @edsantiago brought up would be appreciated
/approve
